title: MCP Tools
description: The agent discovers external MCP tools and exposes them through a normalized tool namespace.

steps.content: Connect the docs server and search for deployment guidance.
steps.annotation: The user asks for a tool source outside the built-in set.
The runtime creates an MCP client for the named server.
External tools are namespaced to avoid collisions.

steps.content: Connected docs with tools: mcp__docs__search, mcp__docs__read
steps.annotation: Tool discovery expands the active tool pool.
The LLM can now call the discovered tool by its normalized name.

steps.content: ["Deploy with npm run build", "Use environment variables for tokens"]
steps.annotation: The external result is appended like any other tool result.

steps.content: The docs server says to build first and keep tokens in environment variables.
steps.annotation: The agent summarizes external tool output for the user.
